reviews.review_description: I even got used to the loud aggressive but funny voice! Edited to add that something happened in the last few weeks. It’s not personal anymore. Maybe it’s just me but it wasn’t so generic before.
LOVE this experience, but I would use it so much more if there were different voice options. This one is a little intense. A softer female voice option would be so lovely.

this is a truly wonderful app -- I love all the thought that went into this.  my only issue is that the last voice that talks during the reading isn't as loud as the first voice -- so is harder to hear,  also the last voice is hard to hear over the caduceus.  is is possible to fix those volume issues?

I have typed in "tarot" before here and never saw this app until the other day. I thought it was new! Lovely experience especially the end when the cards are all tied in together. The visuals are just stunning. I love the deck used but it would be nice to see a version with the Rider Waite. I will use this often either way!

Stoped working after one use...
How I can have my money back?

developer_response.body: Hi. We are really sorry you had this experience. We believe we have found the bug. Unusually... headphone use was causing a crash. An update fix will be released soon. Please reach out to our email and we will happily provide a key for you to have the experience for free. Apologies once again.

reviews.review_title: All is very good --ending key pad fix
reviews.review_description: All very good except for the ending of game. The laser beam for the keypad is blue not able to type words. It needs to be red (NOT BLUE ALL ELSE IS SUPER GOOD) THIS IS VERY HARD TO TYPE REVIEWS. I can       get very little to work at all. ALL GOOD (RED OR SOMETHING NEW IMPOSSIBLE TO USE THIS ENDING--THANK YOU) All works well except this ending. (OTHERS I KNOW HAVE THIS PROBLEM) FIX THIS SOON PLEASE.

There was a issue with my first download of the game and I had received a refund. The game had a bug and it is now fixed. It is very fun to play, the graphics are pretty cool also
You get a full reading that is a pick of past, present and future and get to input your questions. I really enjoy this ☺️

developer_response.body: Hi. We are really sorry you had this experience. We have finally found the bug. It was caused by headphone which was unusual. An update fix will be released soon. Please reach out to our email and we will happily provide a key for you to have the experience for free. Apologies once again.

reviews.review_description: Great experience, quite relaxing in fact. I can confirm it runs on a Quest 3!

reviews.review_title: Very beautiful app – I love it!
reviews.review_description:
I didn't expect it - but this app is really great (I'm using it on Meta Quest 3). It runs smoothly, the immersive environment is stunningly beautiful and made with a lot of love. The descriptions of the cards are really good (I'm a Tarot pro myself) and you can really concentrate on the reading and the meaning of the cards for the question because you feel like you are within in the card. 

Even if you don't believe in tarot, it's a really beautiful and relaxing experience. Like a meditation.

I really hope that this app is successful and will be developed further. For example, I would love it if you could save a reading and look at it again later? And maybe one day even the option to lay other spreads than the standard past-present-future spread? In that case I would be happy to pay for a subscription.

But even now it is a beautiful app and more than worth its price. I wish the developers all the best and hope they are successful with this app.

developer_response.body: Hi Katherina. Thanks for taking the time to review our VR experience. We are very much looking at adding the features you suggest... and a whole lot more. We hope you continue to enjoy the experience!

reviews.review_description: Got it to boot up once after about 30 tries and hasn’t booted up since on Quest 3. Uninstalled and re-installed twice. Hope they fix it otherwise I am will have been ripped off…which sucks. Was cool the one time it worked though.

developer_response.body: Hi. We are really sorry you had this experience. We have finally found the bug. It was caused by headphone use. An update fix is imminent. Please do reach out to our email and we will happily provide a key for you to have the experience for free.

reviews.review_title: A sumptuous symbolic journey into fate
reviews.review_description: Surprisingly profound in a way in which you would not expect VR to be. The visionary immersion in such rich symbolism, combined with immense vistas, and easy game play makes The Tarot Experience feel like a genuine quest into divination in a unique way, that actually enhances the personal experience of doing tarot. I can see that for many this immersive approach will give new possibilities for those seeking cartomantic guidance on matters of personal significance regarding one's destiny and life choices. Great production, visually and audibly. It even stands the test of inducing profound synchronicity, as I was sucked out of the game just as I was drawing the card regarding the present by the a phone call from the very person I was enquiring about. Not sure how the developers programmed that in, but it blew my mind ;0)

developer_response.body: DrDLux... What a great review! Glad you noticed the power of the True Random Number Generator. This is exactly what gives Tarot and this experience it's uncanny ability to speak to you. The future of game interaction will be consciousness! (We think anyway!)

reviews.review_description: This is a truly psychedelic VR trip to the wisdom of the Tarot cards. And somehow the cards  actually speak directly to you and your intention! Magic stuff!
Amazing visual design and  a wonderful introduction to the world of the Tarot. Also a very accurate reading for this user…thank you devs !

developer_response.body: Yes Sir Joshua! Glad you got something out of the experience... that is our goal!

reviews.review_description: This is a beautifully crafted and unique experience, clearly made with love. Surprisingly powerful, and different to anything else I have experienced in VR. Recommended.

developer_response.body: Thanks Sara! Hope you continue to enjoy the experience...
